Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Oncology Care Model Files │ May 2024 │ V 1.0 26 

RPTD_TO_RGSTRY 

LABEL: Participant Reported Episode to OCM Registry 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the OCM participant reported data on this episode to the OCM registry. 

SHORT NAME: RPTD_TO_RGSTRY 

LONG NAME: RPTD_TO_RGSTRY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Clinical and staging 

SOURCE: Oncology Care Model Data Registry 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: OCM
